$comment: Merge this 'permission' block into your opencode.json. OpenCode matches bash permission globs with LAST-MATCH-WINS, so the deny patterns for compound operators sit after the default allow. This is the COARSE layer — it blocks the obvious chaining/substitution/redirect/background operators. The precise 'single pipe into a read-only filter' rule needs the TS plugin (plugin/block-compound-bash.ts), because globs can't express the allowlist.
